summary: The diff implements REQ-74 by adding the OLS logo to the Layout component header. The logo is displayed as a clickable image that navigates to the home page, with responsive sizing for mobile and desktop viewports. However, there is no evidence that the logo image file was added to frontend/public/assets/generated as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: The OLS logo image is rendered as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff that the logo image file (ols-logo.dim_400x300.png) was added to the frontend/public/assets/generated directory. The diff shows 0 added files, but the Layout component references the path '/assets/generated/ols-logo.dim_400x300.png'.
